2605.26068.title: Rethinking Weak Supervision in Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark
2605.26068.paper_summary: Weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) has developed in three primary directions: incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision. However, these directions remain isolated, lacking a unified framework to assess whether they address unique challenges or share fundamental mechanics. This paper introduces WSADBench, the first benchmark that unifies evaluation across distinct weakly supervised scenarios, benchmarking diverse approaches from specialized WSAD methods to advanced tabular foundation models. WSADBench establishes standardized protocols to evaluate 36 algorithms across 4 modalities by systematically varying label quantity, granularity, and quality, revealing the performance boundaries of various methods. Based on over 700K experiments, WSADBench reveals four critical insights: (i) Strong intrinsic correlations exist between these weak supervision scenarios, challenging the isolation of current research directions. (ii) Specialized WSAD algorithms excel only in extreme label-scarcity regimes but are quickly dominated by tabular foundation models and general classification methods as supervision increases or in OOD scenarios. (iii) Unlabeled data shows inconsistent utility across settings, with marginal gains compared to label refinement. (iv) Models exhibit asymmetric sensitivity to different types of label noise. We release WSADBench as an open-source benchmark with code and datasets to facilitate future WSAD research: https://github.com/SUFE-AILAB/WSADBench.
2605.26068.paper_summary_zh: 弱監督異常檢測（WSAD）主要發展了三個方向：不完整、不精確和不準確的監督。<lb/>然而，這些方向仍然是孤立的，缺乏統一的框架來評估它們是否解決了獨特的挑戰或共享基本的機制。<lb/>本文介紹了WSADBench，這是首個統一評估不同弱監督場景的基準，對從專門的WSAD方法到先進的表格基礎模型的各種方法進行基準測試。<lb/>WSADBench建立了標準化的協議，以通過系統性地變化標籤數量、粒度和質量來評估36種算法，揭示各種方法的性能邊界。<lb/>基於超過70萬次實驗，WSADBench揭示了四個關鍵見解：（i）這些弱監督場景之間存在強內在相關性，挑戰了當前研究方向的孤立性。<lb/>(ii) 專門的WSAD算法僅在極端標籤稀缺的情況下表現優異，但隨著監督的增加或在OOD場景中，迅速被表格基礎模型和通用分類方法所主導。<lb/>(iii) 未標記數據在不同設置中的效用不一致，與標籤精煉相比，僅有邊際增益。<lb/>(iv) 模型對不同類型的標籤噪聲表現出不對稱的敏感性。<lb/>我們將WSADBench作為開源基準釋出，並提供代碼和數據集，以促進未來的WSAD研究：https://github.com/SUFE-AILAB/WSADBench。
2605.26068.author: Xu Yao et.al.
2605.26068.authors: Xu Yao, Siyuan Zhou, Wu Zhenbo, Chaochuan Hou, Shuang Liang, Shiping wang, Hailiang Huang, Songqiao Han, Minqi Jiang
